title: Terra Incognita
description: Spicing up exploration with new plants, food, biomes and tools
body:
![Mod title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fd70238722eb750f2bc1a4475cb731117ee4984.png)
 
  **Terra Incognita** is a fully configurable mod that improves world generation and Minecraft's exploration aspect. It adds a plenty of new plants, trees, biomes and useful tools to spruce up your world.  # Mod Spotlights # Features - **Dandelion Puffs** that replace a percentage of vanilla dandelions. And yes, you can blow on them! - Many biome-specific flowers and other plants - New trees: **Apple**, **Hazel**, **Larch** and **Ginkgo** - **Butterflies**: an ambient mob that flutters around and occasionally sits on flowers to rest - **Peat**: a new dirt-like block found in swamps which accelerates crop growth - **Fern Fiddleheads**: a new food item dropped from ferns. Can be used to upgrade suspicious stews - **Baskets**: a portable container for storing foraged stuff - **Wreaths**: a piece of cosmetic headwear that reflects the color of flowers which were used to craft it [See the wiki for a full feature list!](https://github.com/Azmalent/terra-incognita/wiki/) # Mod Integration Terra Incognita aims to integrate with vanilla and various popular mods as tightly as possible to provide a consistent, seamless experience. Here is a list of compatible mods (1.18+): - [**Quark**](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark): wood and storage blocks - [**Botania**](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania): Horn of the Wild support - [**Farmer's Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight): pantries, cooking and cutting recipes [See the wiki for a full list of compatible mods!](https://github.com/Azmalent/terra-incognita/wiki/Mod-Integration) # Credits Code: - The code for basket tooltips and the corresponding sprite were copied from Quark (with minor edits) under the [CC-BY-NC-SA 3.0](https://github.com/VazkiiMods/Quark/blob/master/LICENSE.md) license. Translations: - Spanish by FrannDzs - Chinese (Taiwan) by pancakes0228 - German by elloellie - Portuguese (Brazil) by CerbTheOne Assets: - The logo was made using the amazing website [game-icons.net](https://game-icons.net/) - The title image was made in Blockbench using [the plugin by Ewan Howell](https://ewanhowell.com/plugins/minecraft-title-generator/) and a texture by Magminer, Ewan Howell and SzyszaDev. - Blow sound by [DrMaysta on freesound.org](https://freesound.org/people/Mikes-MultiMedia/sounds/349698/)
